REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-18-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE NOV-08-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORPORATION
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $144.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MILLIKEN, JANICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-18-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
